resources.string: Provide a custom bundler address and port:

"You can connect either via USB (localhost - default) or Wifi. If you connect via USB and running with a physical device, make sure you: 1. Connect your device via USB 2. Set the bundle location to `localhost:8081` 3. Run this command in your terminal: `%1$s`"
Connect to the bundler to debug JavaScript
Disabling Fast Refresh because it requires a development bundle.
Switching to development bundle in order to enable Fast Refresh.
Failed to open DevTools. Please check that the dev server is running and reload the app.
Failed to load bundle. Try restarting the bundler or reconnecting your device.
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Sign in to use this app
Current mode: Repeat all. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat none. Toggle repeat mode.
Current mode: Repeat one. Toggle repeat mode.
This device does not have a fingerprint sensor
Too many attempts. Please try again later.
No PIN, pattern, or password set.
This device does not support PIN, pattern, or password.
Go to your device’s settings to enable the app to use your location in the background
Allow access to your location all the time
Go to your device settings to allow access to your photos
Please allow access to storage to see your photos
Your Android app is now integrated with the Intercom platform
Our bot can answer many common questions
There’s currently no help articles available.
Messages from the team will be shown here
"To allow access, go to your device app settings' permissions menu"
Message summary: {summary}, Teammate name: {name}, Message sent time: {sentTime}.
Message summary: {summary}, Teammate name: {name}, Teammate status: {adminStatus}, Message sent time: {sentTime}.
{app_name} needs camera access so that you can take photos and videos. Tap Settings > Permissions, and turn Camera on.
{app_name} needs microphone access so that you can use voice input. Tap Settings > Permissions, and turn Microphone on.
"We couldn't find any GIFs matching your query"
There are no photos on this device
There are currently no tasks available.
Contain links to take an action in this app
Reply notifications from chats in this app
New chat messages sent from this app
You denied access to your photos
I want to talk to a teammate. I have received an inappropriate message from AI.
Sorry, we couldn’t find any results for that. Try rewording your search.
Send us a message and our bot will reply instantly
Some things failed to load. Try again.
To see your photos you need to allow access to storage
Please select all options that apply
Please enter a valid email address
This question requires at least {response_count} options to be selected
This question requires {response_count} options to be selected
Please select a minimum of {minimum_response_count} and a maximum of {maximum_response_count} options
Please keep answers to a maximum of {character_count} characters
Please ensure answers have a minimum of {character_count} characters
Please enter a valid telephone number
{app_name} typically replies in one business day
{app_name} typically replies in two business days
Tell us what you need help with and our bot will do its best to answer
Thanks! The team will reply in one business day
Thanks! The team will reply in two business days
Thanks! The team will reply as soon as they can
"That country code doesn't look quite right"
That number has too many digits
That number is missing a few digits
That number needs a prefix (+ or 00)
The team can help if needed
The team typically replies in a few hours.
The team typically replies in one business day.
The team typically replies in two business days
You will be notified here and via email at
Please reply with the following information and someone will get back to you soon.
Have a question about this ticket?
Replies and ticket updates will be sent to this email
Your tickets will be shown here
Have a question about this issue?
"We'll notify you once your ticket has an update"
Tickets. You have unread ticket updates.
You will receive updates in the Messenger and via email
We need more information from you
Try different keywords or type your full question
Typically replies in one business day
Typically replies in two business days
You can return here anytime to see responses and send updates.
Share some context to help the team respond better and faster.
Thanks for sending that context. To save time later, feel free to add more details now.
You will be notified here and by email
Date does not match expected pattern: %1$s
Date out of expected year range %1$s - %2$s
Swipe to select a year, or tap to switch back to selecting a day
Scroll to show the next month
Scroll to show the previous month
Switch to text input mode for the time input
Switch to clock mode for the time input
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
"Something went wrong. Reload to try again."
There was an unexpected error, please exit and try again.
We were unable to open Link, please exit and try again.
You can try again later or find another bank to continue.
There was an unexpected error, please exit and try again
"Check that you are connected to WiFi or a mobile network. Once you've established a connection, please exit and try again."
For security reasons, your session has expired. Please exit and try again.
This SDK version %1$s is out of date. Please upgrade your SDK version.
Move further to scan multiple boxes
Search list updated. Tap shutter for details.
This is a dummy checkbox item
For our service provider to verify your identity, click \"I Agree\" to:
Next we will ask for access to your camera to be able to capture your documents
What type of ID will you be capturing?
Valid driver’s license, permit or Government issued photo ID card
Is all the data on the ID clearly visible?
Is all data on the document, including the barcode, visible, glare free, and not blurred?
Check if the document is the front of the ID Card
There was a problem accessing your %1$s account
We found %1$s %2$s accounts but you can only link checking or savings accounts to %3$s. Please try selecting another bank.
We found %1$s %2$s account but you can only link checking or savings accounts to %3$s. Please try selecting another bank.
Please enter your bank details manually or select another bank.
Please select another bank or try again.
Buy now or pay later with <img/>
Pay in <num_installments/> interest-free payments of <installment_price/> with <img/>
Buy now or pay later with Afterpay
By confirming your payment with Amazon Pay, you allow %s to charge your Amazon Pay account for future payments in accordance with their terms.
Please enter your bank details manually
Please enter your bank details manually or select another bank.
Your account number couldn’t be accessed at this time

By providing your bank account details and confirming this payment, you agree to this Direct Debit Request and the Direct Debit Request service agreement, and authorise Stripe Payments Australia Pty Ltd ACN 160 180 343 Direct Debit User ID number 507156 (“Stripe”) to debit your account through the Bulk Electronic Clearing System (BECS) on behalf of %s (the \"Merchant\") for any amounts separately communicated to you by the Merchant. You certify that you are either an account holder or an authorised signatory on the account listed above.
I understand that Stripe will be collecting Direct Debits on behalf of %s and confirm that I am the account holder and the only person required to authorise debits from this account.

" By providing your bank account details and confirming this payment, you agree to this Direct Debit Request and the Direct Debit Request service agreement, and authorise Stripe Payments Australia Pty Ltd ACN 160 180 343 Direct Debit User ID number 507156 (“Stripe”) to debit your account through the Bulk Electronic Clearing System (BECS) on behalf of %1$s (the \"Merchant\") for any amounts separately communicated to you by the Merchant. You certify that you are either an account holder or an authorised signatory on the account listed above. "
The account number you entered is incomplete.
The BSB you entered is incomplete.
The BSB you entered is invalid.
Billing address is same as shipping
"Confirm the payment in your bank's app within %s to complete the purchase."
Only credit and prepaid cards are accepted
Only debit and credit cards are accepted
Only debit and prepaid cards are accepted

"By continuing, you authorize %1$s to debit your Cash App account for this payment and future payments in accordance with %2$s's terms, until this authorization is revoked. You can change this anytime in your Cash App Settings."
Buy now or pay later with Cash App Afterpay
Buy now or pay later with Clearpay
If you cancel now, your account will be linked to %1$s but it will not be saved to Link.
If you cancel now, your account will be linked to this business but it will not be saved to Link.
Your payment information will not be saved.
Do you want to close this form?
Your account can’t be linked at this time. Please try again later.
Maintenance is scheduled to end at %1$s. Please select another bank or try again later.
Please select another bank or try again later.
Your bank account won’t be connected to %1$s and all progress will be lost.
Your bank account won’t be connected to this business and all progress will be lost.
Expiration date. Two digit month and two digit year, empty
Expiration date. %s and two digit year, empty
Expiration date. %s and two digit year, incomplete
We are experiencing issues connecting to our payments provider. Please check your internet connection and try again.
We are unable to authenticate your payment method. Please choose a different payment method and try again.
Timed out authenticating your payment method -- try again
"You haven't finished linking your bank account and all progress will be lost."
Are you sure you want to exit?
The IBAN you entered is incomplete.
The IBAN you entered is invalid, \"%s\" is not a supported country code.
Your IBAN should start with a two-letter country code.
Save your info for secure 1-click checkout with Link
Save my info for faster checkout with Link
Create an account with Link for faster checkout across the web
Enter your account and routing numbers
The IBAN you entered is invalid.
Buy now or pay later with Klarna.

"By continuing to Klarna, you allow %1$s to charge your Klarna account for future payments in accordance with their terms and Klarna's terms. You can change this at any time in your Klarna app or by reaching out to %2$s."
Save your payment information with Link, and securely check out in 1-click on Link-supported sites.
Pay faster everywhere Link is accepted.
By continuing you agree to the <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
Enter the code sent to %1$s. We periodically request this extra step to keep your account safe.
Enter the code sent to %s to use your saved information.
Your bank information will be verified via micro-deposits to your account, typically within 1–2 business days. Only checking accounts are supported.
An error occurred. Check your connection and try again.
Use information you previously saved with your Link account.
By continuing, you agree to authorize payments pursuant to <terms>these terms</terms>.
By saving your bank account for %s you agree to authorize payments pursuant to <terms>these terms</terms>.
"Something went wrong when linking your account. Please try again later."
An email will be sent to %s within three business days to confirm the setup of this debit instruction.
"Additionally, you will receive two days advance notice via email of any amount to be debited under this instruction. Payments will show as '%s' on your bank statement."
Your payments are protected by the %s.
Bank account details cannot be changed.
Get %s back when you pay by bank. See terms
Get %s back when you pay for the first time with your bank. See terms
By providing your card information, you allow %s to charge your card for future payments in accordance with their terms.
By continuing, you agree to save your information for future purchases with %s.
"By continuing, you agree to save your information for future purchases with %s and <link>Link</link>. You also agree to Link's <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy</privacy>."
By continuing, you agree to save your information for future purchases with %s and <link>Link</link> (see <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy</privacy>).
By continuing, you agree to save your information for future purchases with %s and <link>Link</link> according to Link <terms>terms</terms> and <privacy>privacy</privacy>.
Card was not updated. Please try again.

"The payment method on the intent doesn't match the one provided in the createIntentCallback. When using deferred intent creation, ensure you're either creating a new intent with the correct payment method or updating an existing intent with the new payment method ID."
Stripe will deposit $0.01 to your account in 1-2 business days. Then you’ll get an email with instructions to complete payment to %s.
Only card brand can be changed.
Pay with your bank account in just a few steps.
This payment method will be removed but will remain available for %s subscriptions.
Save your bank account in just a few steps.
Save this card for future %s payments
SEPA debit details cannot be changed.
Default payment method was not changed. Please try again.
Card brand was not updated. Please try again.
Confirm the payment in your bank or payment app within %s to complete the purchase.
By confirming your payment with PayPal, you allow %s to charge your PayPal account for future payments in accordance with their terms.
There was an error processing your card -- try again in a few seconds
Confirm the payment in your bank or payment app within %s to complete the purchase.
By confirming your payment with RevolutPay, you allow %s to charge your RevolutPay account for future payments in accordance with their terms.
By continuing, you authorize %1$s to automatically debit your Satispay Balance on a recurring basis in accordance with your purchase or subscription plan.
Save payment details to %s for future purchases

By providing your payment information and confirming this payment, you authorise (A) %s and Stripe, our payment service provider, to send instructions to your bank to debit your account and (B) your bank to debit your account in accordance with those instructions. As part of your rights, you are entitled to a refund from your bank under the terms and conditions of your agreement with your bank. A refund must be claimed within 8 weeks starting from the date on which your account was debited. Your rights are explained in a statement that you can obtain from your bank. You agree to receive notifications for future debits up to 2 days before they occur.
Pay faster at %s and thousands of businesses.
By joining Link, you agree to the <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
By providing your email, you agree to create a Link account and save your payment info to Link, according to the <terms>Link Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
By providing your phone number, you agree to create a Link account and save your payment info to Link, according to the <terms>Link Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
By providing phone number and email, you agree to create a Link account subject to the Link <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
Your accounts were connected but couldn’t be saved with Link.
Your account was connected but couldn’t be saved with Link.
Your accounts were connected and saved with Link.
Your account was connected and saved with Link.
You can expect micro-deposits to account ••••%1$s in 1–2 days and an email with further instructions.
Tap to add is not supported by your device
By continuing, you authorize %1$s to automatically debit your Twint Balance on a recurring basis in accordance with your purchase or subscription plan.
There was an unexpected error -- try again in a few seconds
Open your UPI app to approve your payment within %s
Please go back and select another payment method
Invalid bank account number: must be at most 17 digits long.
Please enter 9 digits for your routing number.
It looks like the verification code you provided is not valid anymore. Click “Resend code” and try again, or
It looks like the verification code you provided is not valid anymore. Try again, or
Hmm, that code didn’t work. Double check it and try again.
Sign in to your Link account
Use your saved info to check out faster
Enter the code sent to %s to use Link to pay by default.
By continuing, you agree to authorize payments pursuant to these <terms>terms</terms>.
By submitting your order to %1$s and %2$s, you agree to save your information with %3$s for future purchases, and agree to authorize payments pursuant to <terms>these terms</terms>.
By submitting your order to %s you agree to authorize payments pursuant to <terms>these terms</terms>.
Debit cards are most likely to be accepted.
For security, please re-enter your card’s security code.
Are you sure you want to remove this linked account?
Are you sure you want to remove this card?
This card has expired. Update your card info or choose a different payment method.
